title: Urgent heart surgery for 8-year-old Ahmed
short_description: Ahmed needs open-heart surgery within weeks. His family cannot afford the hospital bill.
story: Ahmed, 8, was born with a congenital heart defect. Doctors at a Lahore hospital have advised surgery as soon as possible. His father works as a daily wage labourer and the family has already sold small assets to pay for tests. Every donation goes directly toward surgery, ICU stay, and medicines. MTJF field team has verified the case documents.
organizer_bio: Verified MTJF coordinators supporting medical appeals across Punjab.
impact_points: Funds cover surgery and post-op ICU

beneficiary.name: Ahmed Raza
beneficiary.bio: Primary school student; loves cricket. Needs life-saving cardiac surgery.

title: School fees and books for three siblings
short_description: A widow in Karachi is struggling to keep three children in school after her husband passed away.
story: After losing her husband in 2024, Fatima supports three children aged 7, 10, and 12 on a seamstress income. School fees, uniforms, and books for the new academic year exceed what she earns. This appeal will cover one year of fees for all three children at a local government school plus basic stationery.
organizer_bio: Supporting education access for vulnerable families in urban Sindh.
impact_points: Textbooks and notebooks for one year

beneficiary.name: Fatima Bibi (guardian for Ayesha, Hassan, Zainab)
beneficiary.bio: Widow and mother of three; works from home as a seamstress.

title: Monthly ration pack for a family of six
short_description: A labourer family in Faisalabad needs six months of food ration support.
story: Imran fractured his leg and cannot work for several months. Six family members depend on occasional day labour from relatives. This appeal provides monthly ration packs (flour, rice, oil, lentils, tea, soap) for six months so children do not miss meals and can stay in school.
organizer_bio: Delivers verified ration packs to families in economic distress.
impact_points: 6 monthly ration packs for a family of 6

beneficiary.name: Imran Masih
beneficiary.bio: Former factory worker; temporarily disabled; father of four.
